description_long: This ornate sword features a broad, double-edged blade with a pointed tip and intricate gold detailing along its length. The blade is flanked by two upward-curving black quillons, forming an elaborate crossguard with gold embellishments and a spiked, symmetrical design. The hilt is wrapped in a dark material, possibly leather, and ends in a spherical pommel adorned with gold filigree and a central spike. The sword's overall aesthetic is both regal and menacing, suggesting ceremonial or high-status use. Blue accents are visible near the base of the blade, adding a touch of color contrast to the predominantly metallic and gold palette. The craftsmanship and decorative elements indicate it is not a standard utilitarian weapon but rather a display or symbolic piece.
description: An ornate, double-edged sword with gold filigree, blue accents, and an elaborate crossguard and pommel, exuding a regal and ceremonial appearance.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full width of the blade, gold crossguard, blue accents, and detailed pommel.
description_view_1: Side profile revealing the sword's thinness, straight blade, and the cylindrical handle with gold and black segments.
description_view_2: Rear view, nearly identical to the front, displaying the symmetrical blade, crossguard, and pommel details.
description_view_3: Opposite side profile, again highlighting the sword's slim profile and the alignment of the handle and pommel.
attribute_handle_design: straight, wrapped in dark material, gold spherical pommel with filigree
attribute_ornamentation: gold filigree, blue inlays, decorative crossguard and pommel
